name: Asparagus & Pimento
recipeIngredient: 1 lb (450 g) fresh asparagus, trimmed of tough ends
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the asparagus and snap off any tough ends.
2. In a large skillet, bring 1 cup of water to a boil. Add the trimmed asparagus and cover.
3. Steam the asparagus over high heat until it is bright green and tender, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat and drain any excess water.
5. Arrange the steamed asparagus on a serving platter.
6. Sprinkle with lime juice, then garnish with diced pimento and toasted pine nuts.
7. Serve warm or chilled.
NOTE: You may substitute red bell pepper for the pimento if desired.
